labels.detail: Content and vector material removed after the retention window.
Verifies the memory cannot be returned from the candidate/search path. Fail-closed.
Governance tombstone retained for audit and idempotency.
Each step appends a content-safe audit event.

scope_note: Auditable content/vector compaction + retrieval-exclusion verification. NOT crypto-shred and NOT a guarantee of physical disk/page reclamation.
